Petition For Instructions And Appointment Of Trustee For Appointment Of Trustee Under Prob Code 15660 Re: Distribution From Intervivos Trust And Deter
Off Calendar Mar-24-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Douglas Bassin appeared for Mitchel Nisperos (petitioner).
Myrna Lim appeared for Geneiveve Brooks (objector).

At Counsels request the matter is ordered taken off calendar. Parties reached a settlement agreement.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
